theme: Paketlar (apt) va matn ustasi — grep, sed, awk, pipe

tasks.title: Xatolarni sana (grep -c)
tasks.why: Minglab qatorli logда nechta ERROR borligini bir buyruqda bilish — triage.
steps: ERROR qatorlari SONINI yoz:  grep -c ERROR ~/devops/days/day-04/fixtures/server.log > errors.txt
tasks.expect: errors.txt = server.log dagi ERROR qatorlari soni

tasks.title: Unikal IP'larni ajrat (awk + sort -u)
tasks.why: Access-logдан kim kirganini bilish: 1-ustun = IP. awk ustunni, sort -u unikalini oladi.

tasks.title: Configni tahrirla (sed)
tasks.why: Konfigda qiymatni almashtirish — deploy avtomatlashtirishning asosi.

tasks.title: Eng faol IP (pipe zanjiri)
tasks.why: Kim eng ko'p so'rov yuborgan? sort|uniq -c|sort -rn — klassik tahlil zanjiri.
steps: Eng ko'p uchragan IP ni top va FAQAT IP ni yoz:
awk '{print $1}' ~/devops/days/day-04/fixtures/access.log | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' > topip.txt
tasks.expect: topip.txt = eng ko'p so'rov yuborgan IP

tasks.title: Paket versiyasini tekshir
tasks.why: Qaysi versiya o'rnatilgan? Audit va debug uchun muhim.
steps: git versiyasini work/gitver.txt ga yoz:  git --version > gitver.txt

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
steps: pipe ( | ) nima qiladi va `grep` bilan `find` farqini ustozga ayt
